title: 2023年3月大学英语六级真题(第1套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write an essay that begins with the sentence “People are now increasingly aware of the "digital gap' or challenges the elderly face in a digital world." You can make comments, give explanations, or cite examples to develop your essay. You should write at least 150 words but no more than 200 words.

options.C: Following the same diet for years.

options.D: They are cutting back on coffee.

options.B: The man made little contribution to the company.
options.C: The man paid attention to trivial things.
options.D: The man got a poor evaluation from his colleagues.

sections.title: Part IV Translation
sections.directions:
For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to translate a passage from Chinese into English. You
should write your answer on Answer Sheet 2.
sections.source: 陋（Zhang Qian）是中国第一个伟大的探险家。他不畏艰险，克服重重困难，两次出使西域，开通了中国同西亚和欧洲的通商关系，将中国的丝和丝织品运往西亚和欧洲，开拓了历史上著名的“丝绸之路”。同时，他又将西域的风土人情、地理文化以及特有物种等介绍到中原，极大地开阔了人们的视野。正如历史学家所指出的那样，如果没有张骞出使西域，就不可能有丝绸之路的开辟，也就不会有汉朝同西域或欧洲的文化交流。■ 2023年3 月六级真题（第三套）•英语菌的笔记
